note_text: Wound note - Rightheel. Meas 5.2x3.6x3.2cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 37% gran, 63% slough. Periwound macerated. NPWT canister changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Espinoza notified.

Wound note - Rightheel. Meas 5.2x3.6x3.2cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 35% gran, 65% slough. Periwound macerated. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kim notified.
